message:
fix: skip NAPI build in CI to fix Linux build

NAPI shared library requires PIC-compiled libjpeg-turbo which Ubuntu
packages don't provide. Skip NAPI in CI with -Dskip-napi=true.

files.patch:
@@ -111,7 +111,7 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get install -y libturbojpeg0-dev:arm64
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dtarget=${{ matrix.target }}
+        run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dtarget=${{ matrix.target }} -Dskip-napi=true
 
       - name: Rename binary
         run: mv zig-out/bin/termweb ${{ matrix.name }}

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.3",
+  "version": "0.8.4",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
